name: The Weather Thundery Canvas
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かみなり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>気</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>模</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>様</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
"The Weather" Effect Monsters in your Main Monster Zones of this card's column and its adjacent columns gain this effect.
● At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can banish this card; return that opponent's monster to the hand.
You can only control 1 "The Weather Thundery Canvas".

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
